action_units.descriptions:
- AU1 (Inner Brow Raise): inner eyebrows raised (strength: 1.1615)
- AU2 (Outer Brow Raise): outer eyebrows raised (strength: 0.4518)
- AU5 (Upper Lid Raise): eyes wide open (strength: 0.2930)
- AU12 (Lip Corner Puller): lip corners pulled up (smile) (strength: 1.7429)
- AU14 (Dimpler): asymmetric lip movement (one-sided) (strength: 0.1456)
- AU15 (Lip Corner Depressor): lip corners pulled down (frown) (strength: 0.6030)
- AU25 (Lips Part): lips parted (strength: 0.8106)
- AU26 (Jaw Drop): mouth open (jaw dropped) (strength: 1.5964)

attention.summary:
- Strong attention on nose area (intensity: 0.78)
- Strong attention on left eye region (intensity: 0.73)
- Moderate attention on left eyebrow region (intensity: 0.60)
